title: Senior Software Engineer - AgroStar Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - AgroStar Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the AgroStar Global Group family as a Senior Software Engineer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AgroStar Global Group:
AgroStar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar Global Group!
